ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "dept_email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  "dept_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the major */,
  "major_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the major */,
  "major_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_categories" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic category */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic category (e.g., Caucasian, Asian American) */,
  "demographic_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the demographic category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the major the student is enrolled in */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the student */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the student */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the student */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* GPA of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled in the major */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year the student is expected to graduate */,
  "student_status" TEXT /* Status of the student (e.g., active, inactive, graduated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "student_demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student demographic entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic category */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of students in the demographic category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographic_categories ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the major the course is part of */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "course_enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade the student received in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prerequisites" (
  "course_prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
